nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克
nodes.summary: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联61种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、黑脸琵鹭、Malayan crested fireback等61种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 褐短嘴旋木雀
nodes.summary: 褐短嘴旋木雀（Brown treecreeper，学名 Climacteris picumnus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于昆拉德·雅各布·特明克，主要威胁包括气候变化、栖息地破坏。

nodes.name: 气候变化
nodes.summary: 长期改变水文节律与生态系统稳定性的全球变化因素。

links.key: bird-褐短嘴旋木雀-88998610__distributed_in__loc-昆拉德-雅各布-特明克-10490da9
links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The brown treecreeper (Climacteris picumnus) is the largest Australasian treecreeper

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The conservation status of the brown treecreeper is considered of "least concern" by the IUCN, while the subspecies victoriae, is listed in New South Wales as Vulnerable under Schedule 2 of the Threatened Species Conservation Act (1995). Subspecies victoriae is listed as nationally Vulnerable by DCCEEW (Department of Climate Change, Energy, the Environment and Water), under the Environment Protection and Biodiversity Conservation Act (1999)

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Threats to the species include land clearing and the resultant habitat loss and fragmentation, the impacts of which are thought to disrupt dispersal and therefore recruitment. The removal of fallen timber and other woody debris, and competition with exotic species such as the common starling for nesting hollows are also threats to the species. Subspecies melanotus has declined from eastern parts of its range in Cape York Peninsula, thought to be due to more extensive and frequent fire regime, which has affected fallen tree trunks and logs (a preferred foraging substrate for this species).{{Cite journal | last1 = Garnett | first1 = S
